# PERF-139 negative: no closure, variable passed explicitly
lang: go
file: PERF-139-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

func SafeNoClosureHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	secret := r.Header.Get("Authorization")
	writeSecret(w, secret)
}

func writeSecret(w http.ResponseWriter, data string) {
	_, _ = io.Copy(w, strings.NewReader(data))
}
